items.a: Our salon is at Carrefour Charlesbourg, 8500 boulevard Henri-Bourassa, Québec, QC G1G 5X1. Come in through the mall's Entrances 5 to reach us easily.
We welcome clients Monday to Wednesday 9 a.m.–5:30 p.m., Thursday and Friday 9 a.m.–8 p.m., Saturday 9 a.m.–5 p.m., and Sunday 10 a.m.–5 p.m.

items.q: How do I book a visit?
items.a: Book online from our Book Online page, or call (581) 981-8228. We also take walk-ins when the schedule allows.
Yes. Carrefour Charlesbourg has ample free parking, and coming in through Entrances 5 brings you close to the salon.

items.q: How do I get there by public transit?
items.a: Several RTC bus routes serve Carrefour Charlesbourg on boulevard Henri-Bourassa. Get off at the mall stop, then follow the signs toward Entrances 5.

items.q: Is there a wait on weekends?
items.a: Saturday is usually our busiest day. Walk-ins are welcome based on availability, but booking ahead guarantees your time slot.

items.q: Is a deposit required to book?
items.a: No deposit is required for most everyday services. For group appointments or longer treatments a deposit may apply; we'll let you know when you book.
You're welcome to change or cancel your appointment. A few hours' notice lets us offer the slot to another client — a quick call is enough.

items.q: How much is a full set?
items.a: The price depends on the service and finishes. A full set starts at a reasonable rate, and a fill costs less than a new set. Current details are on our Services page.
Solid shades are included in the service. More complex nail-art designs may carry an extra charge based on the time involved; ask for an estimate before your appointment.

items.q: Can I request a specific technician?
items.a: Yes. Note your preference when booking and we'll try to assign you the same technician, subject to availability.

items.q: Do you do gel polish for manicures?
items.a: Yes. Our manicures come with regular polish or long-lasting gel polish. Let us know your choice and we'll guide you to the best option.
We offer nail enhancements (full set), fills, hand care and foot care. Visit our Services page for the full list.
